pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 17 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
Upgrade Spring Framework from 5.x to 6.x, which requires Java 17 and introduces breaking API changes.
Upgrade Servlet API to version 6.0.0 to align with Jakarta EE 10 and Spring 6 requirements.
Upgrade JUnit Jupiter and Platform to version 5.10.0 to support modern testing features and Java 17.
Upgrade Mockito to version 5.8.0 to ensure compatibility with Java 17 and Spring 6.
Upgrade Jackson to version 2.16.1 for security patches and Java 17 compatibility.
Upgrade Byte Buddy to version 1.14.11 to support Java 17 class file structures.
Upgrade Logback to version 1.4.14 to support SLF4J 2.x and Java 17.
Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.9 to align with Logback 1.4.x and modern logging standards.
Upgrade Jetty to version 11.0.19 to support Jakarta EE 9+ and Java 17.
Upgrade Tomcat to version 10.1.17 to support Jakarta EE 10 and Java 17.
Upgrade Undertow to version 2.3.10.Final to support Jakarta EE 10 and Java 17.
Upgrade Swagger annotations to version 1.6.12 for compatibility with newer frameworks.
Add Google Truth as a new testing dependency for more readable assertions.
Update various Maven plugins (Surefire, Compiler, Jacoco, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 17 and modern Maven.
Refactor POM to use dependencyManagement and change packaging to pom for a parent project structure.
Update groupId to reflect the new parent project structure.
Update artifactId to reflect the new parent project structure.
Update project version to 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the new development cycle.
Update project description to include JUnit and Mockito for clarity.
pom.xml.human_impl: <description>REST web-service mocking utility for Spring using JUnit and Mockito</description>

.gitignore.general_idea: Add IntelliJ IDEA configuration directory to gitignore to prevent IDE-specific files from being tracked.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite README to reflect the shift from JUnit 4 Rules to JUnit 5 Extensions and modular artifact structure.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced `@Rule` and `RestServiceRule` examples with `@ExtendWith(MockitoSpringEndpointExtension.class)` and `@MockEndpoint` annotations.

README.md.general_idea: Update dependency snippets to show the new modular artifact IDs for JUnit 5 and JUnit 4.
README.md.human_impl: Changed artifact ID from `mockito-rest-spring` to `junit5-${flavour}` and `junit4-${flavour}`.

README.md.general_idea: Update the history section to document the release of version 1.0.3 and 1.1.0.
README.md.human_impl: Added entries for 1.1.0 and 1.0.3, updating the release link to point to 1.0.3.
